overall.description: First-person exploration through a gothic castle interior (Hogwarts Legacy), walking through wood-paneled corridors and arched hallways, entering a bathroom with a golden mermaid statue, exploring an industrial boiler room behind a hidden door, and returning to the main corridor.

events.description: moving from the map gallery area toward the stairwell corridor
approaching the arched doorway leading to the main hallway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wood-paneled walls past large framed maps

entered.detail: ornate framed map of a coastal region mounted on dark wood paneling
dark mahogany wood panels covering the corridor walls
brass wall-mounted lanterns with warm amber glow
carved wooden balustrade along the corridor edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a large framed map in a wood-paneled corridor. The camera moves forward past mahogany walls illuminated by warm brass sconces, approaching an arched doorway that leads to the main hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic arched corridor with tall windows

events.description: passing a large potted palm plant in a decorative ceramic pot
approaching the ornate wooden door leading to the bathroom

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor with high arched ceilings toward a door at the end

entered.detail: high vaulted stone ceiling with gothic archways
tall narrow windows with stone tracery showing darkness outside
large potted plant in an ornate blue and white ceramic planter
simple wooden bench against the wall
heavy carved wooden door with metal studs and handles

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a long gothic corridor with high arched ceilings and tall windows. Warm lantern light illuminates stone walls as the camera passes a potted palm and wooden bench, approaching a heavy wooden door at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: public bathroom with sinks and stalls

events.description: entering the bathroom with the golden mermaid statue visible ahead
approaching the out-of-order stall door at the back of the bathroom

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom and moving toward the back stall with the out-of-order sign

entered.detail: golden statue of a mermaid atop a large central fountain with multiple sinks
ornate white porcelain sinks arranged in a semicircle
white painted wooden stall doors with black iron hardware
polished white marble tile flooring
small chalkboard sign reading 'Out of Order' hanging on a stall door

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a grand bathroom featuring a golden mermaid statue fountain surrounded by sinks. Moving across white marble floors, the camera approaches a bathroom stall at the back marked with an 'Out of Order' sign.

events.description: passing through the out-of-order stall door into the hidden boiler room
approaching the large steam boiler with glowing fire inside

agents.ego_description: exploring the industrial boiler room, examining the large furnace and network of pipes

entered.detail: large riveted metal steam pipes running along walls and ceiling
massive cylindrical boiler with glowing fire behind metal grates and celtic knot design
stacks of cut firewood for the furnace
exposed red brick walls with white tile accents

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stall door reveals an industrial boiler room with exposed brick walls and massive steam pipes. The camera explores around a large glowing boiler surrounded by piles of firewood, the warm firelight contrasting with the cool metal infrastructure.

events.description: exiting the boiler room back into the bathroom area
leaving the bathroom and returning to the main hallway

agents.ego_description: exiting the boiler room and bathroom, walking back through the corridor toward large wooden doors

entered.detail: golden mermaid statue atop the fountain passed on the return path
ornate sinks visible while exiting the bathroom
tall heavy wooden doors with gothic arches at the end of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the boiler room back through the bathroom, passing the mermaid statue and sinks once more. Returning to the main corridor, the camera approaches large wooden double doors at the hallway's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the refined elegance of wood-paneled corridors into a hidden industrial underworld before returning to the castle's main halls. It begins by gliding past a framed map and mahogany walls lit by brass sconces, moving through an arched doorway into a grand gothic corridor characterized by high ceilings and stone walls. As the camera passes a potted palm and wooden bench, it enters a marble bathroom centered around a golden mermaid statue fountain, eventually passing through an out-of-order stall door. The scene then shifts abruptly into a gritty boiler room filled with exposed brick, massive steam pipes, and the warm glow of a large furnace surrounded by firewood. Finally, the camera retraces its steps back through the bathroom and past the mermaid statue, returning to the main corridor to approach a set of large wooden double doors.
